title: 宝塚記念の後に・受け取ったバトン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... pant... I let it all... out on... the track...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How'd... Brusquement do?

text_block_list.name: Brusquement
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She looks like she's in rough shape... I didn't think
a prodigy racer like her would ever get tired...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I guess she has her limits, too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush over to her with a towel and supplements,
when...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I feel like I was really able to run as
myself on the track today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement was just as incredible as always, but
her performance was even sharper and more
refined than last year.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: There's no way I could run like that. But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She can't run my way either. Brute forcing through things and going all out isn't her style...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's mine. I'm the only one who can run like that...
We both have our own unique running styles...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wow... There are so many happy fans...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After half a year, they were finally able to see
each other for who they really are and bring
closure to their classic-year rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita... How was she able to squeeze so much
power into her running?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Could I do the same? Do I know my strengths?
Am I holding on to things that need to go?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to lose... I really don't... want to be
left behind...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This fall, I swear I'll win a G1 race. I will rise no
matter what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, after the awards ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It seems Brusquement injured her leg during the
race. We won't know to what extent until the test
results come back, however.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? She got hurt?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but she's incredibly pleased she was able to
run against you. You gave her a very fulfilling
race, Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As one who was raised under my mother's
tutelage, she was able to learn more about herself
on a deeper level today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What she's learned today will live on, not only for
her sake but for those who come after her as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...That said, with her leg in its current state, she
won't be able to start sprinting at full force right
away. Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This fall, race in her stead, Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me? Run for Brusquement too?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Though the legacies in your blood are
different, your passion for racing is one and the
same...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And the only one she can entrust that passion
to... is you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Got it! I'll run for her, Air Groove! I promise!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives a slight nod before taking her
leave.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the autumn Tenno Sho, Trainer. After
that will be three back-to-back G1 races...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My opponents are only going to get stronger
from here, and my endurance is going to be
pushed to its limit, but...
choice_data_list:
You've got to keep going, for Brusquement's
sake too.

You've got to keep going, for Brusquement's
sake too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Man, my chest feels so hot! It's like I got a
huge boost of power today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the baton entrusted to her and a new fire in
her eyes, Kitasan Black has reached yet another
new level in her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, the curtain falls on the three
consecutive spring G1 races.
